species: A two-component system GtrS-GltR is required for glucose transport activity in P. aeruginosa
sample_source: Drosophila melanogaster and mouse models of infection
the gltB deletion mutant showed attenuated virulence in both Drosophila melanogaster and mouse models of infection.
strain: we deleted the gtrS-gltR locus encoding the GtrS-GltR TCS in the P. aeruginosa reference strain PAO1...
